meta.tagline: Full Stack Developer · Demo Profile · CodeAether Platform

hero.alertText: DEMO PROFILE LOADED — REGISTER TO CREATE YOURS

bio: This is a demo profile generated by the CodeAether platform. Register your own account to have our AI agents extract your professional data from your resume and LinkedIn profile.
Your real profile will include your actual experience, skills, projects, and certifications — all presented in this immersive Solo Leveling–inspired RPG interface.

skills.name: React.js
skills.desc: Build enterprise frontends with React 18, hooks, context, and state management patterns.

skills.name: JavaScript / ES2022+
skills.desc: Deep mastery of modern JS including async/await, destructuring, and module systems.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.desc: Type-safe development with interfaces, generics, and strict null checks.

skills.name: HTML5 / CSS3
skills.desc: Build responsive, accessible UIs with semantic HTML5, Flexbox, Grid, and animations.

skills.name: Node.js / Express
skills.desc: Build REST APIs and microservices with Node.js, Express, and middleware pipelines.

skills.name: Python / FastAPI
skills.desc: Data processing, machine learning integrations, and high-performance REST APIs.

skills.name: SQL / PostgreSQL
skills.desc: Design relational schemas, optimize queries, and manage complex data pipelines.

skills.name: AWS / GCP
skills.desc: Deploy cloud-native applications with containerized microservices.

skills.name: Docker / Kubernetes
skills.desc: Containerize and orchestrate applications for scalable production deployments.

skills.name: CI/CD Pipelines
skills.desc: Automate build, test, and deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions.

achievements: Register your account to have AI extract your real work experience from your resume.
Our Profile Agent (powered by Google Gemini) will generate accurate, RPG-styled descriptions of your actual achievements.
All data is extracted automatically — no manual input required beyond your resume upload.
Your previous roles and internships will be captured from your resume.
Each position gets its own rank badge based on seniority level.
Achievements are transformed into epic hunter-style accomplishments.

projects.title: Your Best Project
projects.desc: Register your account and upload your resume to have AI automatically extract and showcase your real projects here. Each project gets assigned a rank based on complexity and impact.

projects.title: Open Source Contribution
projects.desc: Your open source work and personal projects will be featured with proper tech stack badges and direct links to GitHub repositories.

certifications.title: Your Cloud Certification (e.g. AWS Solutions Architect)
Register to display your real certifications & achievements
B.S. / M.S. in Computer Science or related field
